name: Father Dobey
description: Serves as vicar at the Church of St. Pastery in Lankshorn. Carries a gold holy symbol. Lives in a thatched-roof cottage in town.
notes: His servant Mabble vanished three days ago and he was troubled by the disappearance.

When the party returned Mabble to his cottage, Dobey was relieved — though he put on something of a show — and troubled to learn crookhorns were nesting so close to Lankshorn. He dressed Mabble's head wound himself.
Connected to the quest to find the missing.
